items.title: In-Context World Modeling for Robotic Control
items.summary: Researchers introduce a new method for robotic control that utilizes in-context world modeling, allowing robots to learn and adapt more effectively to complex environments.

items.title: SoftBank's CEO Questions Elon Musk's Orbital Data Center Hype
items.summary: SoftBank's CEO joins others in expressing skepticism regarding Elon Musk's ambitious claims about developing an orbital data center, raising questions about its feasibility and impact.

items.title: Apple Vision Pro Executive Reportedly Joins OpenAI
items.summary: A key executive from Apple's Vision Pro team is reportedly departing to join OpenAI, signaling a significant talent shift towards leading AI research and development.

items.title: AI Learns the "Dark Art" of RF Chip Design
items.summary: AI is now being successfully applied to the highly complex and specialized field of radio frequency (RF) chip design, potentially revolutionizing hardware development.

items.title: GUI vs. CLI: Execution Bottlenecks in Screen-Only and Skill-Mediated Computer-Use Agents
items.summary: A new study investigates the performance bottlenecks faced by AI agents when interacting with computers via graphical user interfaces versus command-line interfaces, highlighting challenges in agent design.

items.title: V-Zero: Answer-Label-Free On-Policy Distillation for Fine-Grained Visual Reasoning
items.summary: Researchers introduce V-Zero, a novel method for fine-grained visual reasoning that uses answer-label-free on-policy distillation with contrastive evidence gating, improving model efficiency and performance.

items.title: How Omio is Building the Future of Conversational Travel with AI
items.summary: Omio leverages OpenAI's advanced AI to develop conversational travel experiences, aiming to streamline planning and booking for users.

items.title: UnityShots: Memory-Driven Multi-Shot Audio-Video Generation
items.summary: A new model called UnityShots enables memory-driven multi-shot audio-video generation with boundary-aware gating, pushing the boundaries of realistic multimedia content creation.

items.title: Fast LeWorldModel: Efficient World Modeling for AI Agents
items.summary: This paper presents Fast LeWorldModel, an efficient approach to world modeling that allows AI agents to process and understand their environments more quickly.

items.title: How Small Can an Agent Model Get? The Nemotron Floor
items.summary: This article explores the minimum viable size for agent models, discussing the 'Nemotron Floor' and its implications for efficient AI agent deployment.

items.title: Why Multi-Step Tool-Use Reinforcement Learning Collapses and How Supervisory Signals Fix It
items.summary: Researchers analyze the failure modes in multi-step tool-use reinforcement learning and propose supervisory signals as a solution to enhance stability and performance.

items.title: LISA: Likelihood Score Alignment for Visual-condition Controllable Generation
items.summary: LISA introduces a novel likelihood score alignment technique for visual-condition controllable generation, offering more precise control over AI-generated visual content.

items.title: Autodata: An Agentic Data Scientist to Create High Quality Synthetic Data
items.summary: Autodata proposes an agentic data scientist system capable of generating high-quality synthetic data, which can significantly benefit machine learning development and privacy-preserving research.

items.title: Information-Aware KV Cache Compression for Long Reasoning in LLMs
items.summary: A new technique for information-aware KV cache compression is introduced, designed to improve the efficiency and capability of Large Language Models in long-context reasoning tasks.

items.title: 5 Things Your LLM Bill Is Hiding From You (And How to Find Them)
items.summary: This practical guide reveals hidden costs in Large Language Model usage bills and provides strategies for identifying and managing them to optimize expenses.
